name: Roasted Beef with Horseradish Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a dutch oven, stir together all marinade ingredients except parsley and roast the beef. Stir in parsley.
2. Place the roast in the marinade and turn to coat all sides with marinade. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
4. Bake the roast in the marinade for 1 1/2 to 2 hours or until the roast is fork tender.
5. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, stir together all horseradish cream ingredients except parsley. Stir in parsley and cover. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Serve over carved roast.
